title: Current Time
description: A spigot plugin to set your world(s) to the current irl time.
body:
### Current Time

A spigot plugin to set your world(s) to the current irl time.

### Commands and Permissions
The plugin currently only has one command: `/currenttime`. This command is available with the permission `currenttime.reload` and reloads the plugin's `config.yml` file. You can also run this command with the alias `/ct`.
